stage_1_classifier.reason: Customer explicitly stated they are not in the market for the services offered because they are 'essentially doing the same thing' using the same tech stack (Langchain, Langraph, 11 Labs, Whisper, DeepGram). This was a discovery call that revealed no product-market fit - both companies are competitors rather than customer-vendor.
